business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number WC GLFS 2025 8820; 2024 carrier Hanover Insurance Group, 10 claims, no cancellations
2023 carrier Hartford Financial Services, 13 claims, no cancellations
2022 carrier Auto-Owners Insurance, 12 claims, no cancellations

positives: GPS tracking and ELD devices installed in all vehicles
MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually
CDL licenses verified for all drivers at time of hire
Valid DOT number and MC authority maintained
Hired auto / non-owned auto exposure covered
38 years in business with 25 years under current management
No cancellations in prior insurance history (2022-2024)
Drivers in compliance with FMCSA Hours-of-Service (HOS) regulations
concerns: No written contracts with all subcontractors
CSA BASIC score in Crash Indicator is above intervention threshold (currently being addressed)
DOT violations or out-of-service orders in the past 3 years
CSA BASIC score in Vehicle Maintenance is within 10% of intervention threshold
Handwritten date discrepancy on signature page (6/18/2025 vs. 03/15/2026)
Note on prior insurance history table: 'Need docs'
Sleeper-cab tractors used for long-haul operations
Refrigerated reefer units carrying perishable freight
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 2024: Hanover Insurance Group, 10 claims, premium $2,088,013.98, no cancellations. 2023: Hartford Financial Services, 13 claims, premium $2,071,475.35, no cancellations. 2022: Auto-Owners Insurance, 12 claims, premium $2,014,585.01, no cancellations.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. Primary commodities hauled: Dry van — general freight, packaged goods; Flatbed — steel, lumber, machinery. ICC operating authority: Interstate (FMCSA) only.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. GPS tracking and ELD devices installed in all vehicles. MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually. CDL licenses verified for all drivers at time of hire. Drivers in compliance with FMCSA Hours-of-Service (HOS) regulations.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Three-year loss history: 2024 — 10 claims, $2,088,013.98 premium (Hanover Insurance Group); 2023 — 13 claims, $2,071,475.35 premium (Hartford Financial Services); 2022 — 12 claims, $2,014,585.01 premium (Auto-Owners Insurance). No cancellations in any year. CSA BASIC Crash Indicator score is above intervention threshold and currently being addressed.
